title: The Doctor and the Girl
writer: Maxence Van der Meersch, Theodore Reeves
actors: Glenn Ford, Charles Coburn, Gloria DeHaven
plot: Dr. Michael Corday, a recent graduate of the Harvard Medical School, is the son of Dr. John Corday, an eminent New York City surgeon who has a tendency to continue to direct the lives of his grown children. The daughter, Fabienne,...
